description_long: This house features a modern, boxy design with clean, straight lines and a flat roof. The structure is composed of multiple rectangular volumes stacked and arranged to create a sense of depth and variation. One side of the house includes a series of large, rectangular windows set in a row, providing ample natural light to the interior. A partially covered terrace or patio area is visible, with a slatted pergola structure offering shade. The main entryway is recessed and simple, lacking ornate details, and the exterior is finished in a uniform, light beige color. The overall appearance is minimalist and functional, with an emphasis on geometric forms and open spaces.
description: A modern, minimalist house with flat roofs, large rectangular windows, and a light beige exterior. The design features stacked box-like volumes and a shaded terrace area.
description_view_0: This view shows the rear or side of the house with a small, recessed entryway and minimal window openings.
description_view_1: This angle highlights the row of large rectangular windows and the slatted pergola covering the terrace area.
description_view_2: The front facade is visible here, featuring the main entryway, multiple windows, and the expansive flat roof with the pergola structure.
description_view_3: This side view emphasizes the solid, unbroken wall surfaces and the stepped arrangement of the flat roofs.
attribute_entryway_design: Recessed, minimal entryway with no porch or decorative elements, flush with the facade.
